case_title: OCEAN VENTURING LLC VS. ANDRE CURRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCEAN VENTURING LLC SERVED SEP-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-07-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, ANDRE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCEAN VENTURING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURRY, ANDRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 209 OCEAN AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCEAN VENTURING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, ANDRE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
